ObjectStates.Name: Custom_Tile
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
colorList = {'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Black'}
colorCode = {}
colorCode['White'] = 'FFFFFF'
colorCode['Brown'] = '713B17'
colorCode['Red'] = 'DA1A18'
colorCode['Orange'] = 'F4641D'
colorCode['Yellow'] = 'E7E52C'
colorCode['Green'] = '31B32B'
colorCode['Teal'] = '21B19B'
colorCode['Blue'] = '1E87FF'
colorCode['Purple'] = 'A020F0'
colorCode['Pink'] = 'F570CE'
colorCode['Black'] = '404040'
marker = {}
rspValue = {}
participantsStr = ''

function onLoad()
    -- self.createButton({position={x=0, y=0.505, z=0.67}, scale={7.2, 1, 2.6}, color={r=1, g=0, b=0, a=0}, 
    --     click_function='userFunction', function_owner=self, tooltip=self.getName()})
    initialize()
    self.addContextMenuItem("가위 내기", use_s, true)
    self.addContextMenuItem("바위 내기", use_r, true)
    self.addContextMenuItem("보 내기", use_p, true)
    self.addContextMenuItem("취소하기", cancel, true)
    self.addContextMenuItem("결과 보기", run)
end

function initialize()
    for i = 1, #colorList do
        rspValue[colorList[i]] = nil
        marker[colorList[i]] = '<textcolor color="#' .. colorCode[colorList[i]] .. '">■</textcolor>'
    end
end

function addParticipants(color)
    if string.find(participantsStr, colorCode[color]) then
    else
        participantsStr = participantsStr .. marker[color]
    end
    self.UI.setValue('uistring', participantsStr)
    self.UI.setAttribute('text1', 'active', 'true')
end

function removeParticipants(color)
    if string.find(participantsStr, colorCode[color]) then
        participantsStr = string.gsub(participantsStr, marker[color], '')
    else
    end
    self.UI.setValue('uistring', participantsStr)
end

function use_s(player_color, position, object)
    if player_color == 'Grey' then
        return
    end
    if rspValue[player_color] == nil then
        addParticipants(player_color)
    end
    rspValue[player_color] = '가위'
    if Player[player_color].seated == true then
        broadcastToColor('당신은 가위를 냈습니다.', player_color)
    end
end
function use_r(player_color, position, object)
    if player_color == 'Grey' then
        return
    end
    if rspValue[player_color] == nil then
        addParticipants(player_color)
    end
    rspValue[player_color] = '바위'
    if Player[player_color].seated == true then
        broadcastToColor('당신은 바위를 냈습니다.', player_color)
    end
end
function use_p(player_color, position, object)
    if player_color == 'Grey' then
        return
    end
    if rspValue[player_color] == nil then
        addParticipants(player_color)
    end
    rspValue[player_color] = '보'
    if Player[player_color].seated == true then
        broadcastToColor('당신은 보를 냈습니다.', player_color)
    end
end
function cancel(player_color, position, object)
    if player_color == 'Grey' then
        return
    end
    if rspValue[player_color] ~= nil then
        removeParticipants(player_color)
    end
    rspValue[player_color] = nil
    if Player[player_color].seated == true then
        broadcastToColor('당신은 아무것도 내지 않습니다.', player_color)
    end
end

function run(player_color, position, object)
    local swr = 0
    local sws = 0
    local swp = 0
    local draw = 0
    local winner_r = 0
    local winner_s = 0
    local winner_p = 0
    local winner_list = '승자 :'
    for i = 1, #colorList do
        if rspValue[colorList[i]] ~= nil then
            if rspValue[colorList[i]] == '가위' then
                sws = 1
            elseif rspValue[colorList[i]] == '바위' then
                swr = 1
            elseif rspValue[colorList[i]] == '보' then
                swp = 1
            end
        end
    end
    if swr + sws + swp == 2 then
        if swr == 0 then
            winner_s = 1
            for i = 1, #colorList do
                if rspValue[colorList[i]] == '가위' then
                    rspValue[colorList[i]] = '[33FF33]가위[FFFFFF]'
                    if Player[colorList[i]].seated == true then
                        winner_list = winner_list .. ' [' .. colorCode[colorList[i]] .. ']'.. Player[colorList[i]].steam_name .. '[FFFFFF]'
                    else
                        winner_list = winner_list .. ' [' .. colorCode[colorList[i]] .. ']'.. colorList[i] .. '플레이어[FFFFFF]'
                    end
                elseif rspValue[colorList[i]] == '보' then
                    rspValue[colorList[i]] = '[FF3333]보[FFFFFF]'
                end
            end
        elseif sws == 0 then
            winner_p = 1
            for i = 1, #colorList do
                if rspValue[colorList[i]] == '보' then
                    rspValue[colorList[i]] = '[33FF33]보[FFFFFF]'
                    if Player[colorList[i]].seated == true then
                        winner_list = winner_list .. ' [' .. colorCode[colorList[i]] .. ']'.. Player[colorList[i]].steam_name .. '[FFFFFF]'
                    else
                        winner_list = winner_list .. ' [' .. colorCode[colorList[i]] .. ']'.. colorList[i] .. '플레이어[FFFFFF]'
                    end
                elseif rspValue[colorList[i]] == '바위' then
                    rspValue[colorList[i]] = '[FF3333]바위[FFFFFF]'
                end
            end
        else
            winner_r = 1
            for i = 1, #colorList do
                if rspValue[colorList[i]] == '바위' then
                    rspValue[colorList[i]] = '[33FF33]바위[FFFFFF]'
                    if Player[colorList[i]].seated == true then
                        winner_list = winner_list .. ' [' .. colorCode[colorList[i]] .. ']'.. Player[colorList[i]].steam_name .. '[FFFFFF]'
                    else
                        winner_list = winner_list .. ' [' .. colorCode[colorList[i]] .. ']'.. colorList[i] .. '플레이어[FFFFFF]'
                    end
                elseif rspValue[colorList[i]] == '가위' then
                    rspValue[colorList[i]] = '[FF3333]가위[FFFFFF]'
                end
            end
        end
    else
        draw = 1
    end
    for i = 1, #colorList do
        if rspValue[colorList[i]] ~= nil then
            if Player[colorList[i]].seated == true then
                printToAll('[' .. colorCode[colorList[i]] .. ']' .. Player[colorList[i]].steam_name .. '[FFFFFF] >> ' .. rspValue[colorList[i]])
            else
                printToAll('[' .. colorCode[colorList[i]] .. ']' .. colorList[i] .. '플레이어[FFFFFF] >> ' .. rspValue[colorList[i]])
            end
        end
        
        rspValue[colorList[i]] = nil
    end
    participantsStr = ''
    self.UI.setValue('uistring', participantsStr)
    self.UI.setAttribute('text1', 'active', 'false')
    if draw == 1 then
        broadcastToAll('무승부입니다.')
    else
        broadcastToAll(winner_list)
    end
end
ObjectStates.XmlUI:
<Panel position="0 0 -51" rotation="0 0 180" width="1500" height="2000" scale="0.1 0.1 0.1">
    <Text id="text1" active="false" rectAlignment="UpperLeft" offsetXY="0 0" alignment="UpperLeft" color="#FFFFFF" fontSize="150" width="1500" height="300" fontStyle="Bold"><textsize size="100">참가자 : </textsize></Text>
    <Text id="uistring" rectAlignment="UpperLeft" offsetXY="390 0" alignment="UpperLeft" color="#FFFFFF" outLine="#FFFFFF" outLineSize="5 -5" fontSize="150" width="1500" height="300" fontStyle="Bold"></Text>
</Panel>
